nasb.text: But Moses said, “You must also let us have sacrifices and burnt offerings, that we may sacrifice them to the Lord our God.

esv.text: But Moses said, “You must also let us have sacrifices and burnt offerings, that we may sacrifice to the Lord our God.

cnv.text: 摩西回答：“你也要把獻祭用的祭物和燔祭交給我們，使我們可以獻給耶和華我們的　神。

ccb.text: 摩西回答说：“你要让我们带走牛羊，因为它们是献给我们上帝耶和华的祭物和燔祭牲。
